queries.sql: SELECT facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "query_agent_test" GROUP BY facility_zone ORDER BY cnt DESC

expected.note: GROUP BY facility_zone with COUNT, ORDER BY cnt DESC

queries.sql: SELECT operation_mode, ROUND(AVG(load_factor), 2) AS avg_load, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE load_factor IS NOT NULL GROUP BY operation_mode ORDER BY avg_tput DESC

expected.note: GROUP BY operation_mode with multiple AVG aggregates

queries.sql: SELECT sorter_model, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE match_all('warehouse') GROUP BY sorter_model ORDER BY cnt DESC

expected.note: GROUP BY sorter_model with WHERE match_all filter

queries.sql: SELECT SUM(throughput_rate) AS total_throughput FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL

expected.note: Single-row aggregate: SUM with WHERE filter

queries.sql: SELECT conveyor_lane, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(AVG(load_factor), 2) AS avg_load FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE load_factor IS NOT NULL GROUP BY conveyor_lane HAVING AVG(load_factor) > 40.0 ORDER BY avg_load DESC

expected.note: GROUP BY with HAVING on AVG

queries.sql: SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput FROM "query_agent_test" GROUP BY facility_zone, operation_mode ORDER BY facility_zone ASC, cnt DESC

expected.note: Multi-column GROUP BY with AVG and COUNT

queries.sql: SELECT control_center, SUM(item_count) AS total_items, ROUND(AVG(charge_remaining), 2) AS avg_charge, MIN(charge_remaining) AS min_charge, MAX(charge_remaining) AS max_charge FROM "query_agent_test" GROUP BY control_center ORDER BY total_items DESC

expected.note: Multiple aggregates: SUM, AVG, MIN, MAX on charge_remaining

queries.sql: SELECT facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COUNT(DISTINCT sorter_model) AS distinct_sorters FROM "query_agent_test" GROUP BY facility_zone ORDER BY cnt DESC

expected.note: COUNT and COUNT DISTINCT in same GROUP BY

queries.sql: SELECT build_signature, ROUND(AVG(runtime_hours), 1) AS avg_runtime, MIN(runtime_hours) AS min_runtime, MAX(runtime_hours) AS max_runtime FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE runtime_hours IS NOT NULL GROUP BY build_signature ORDER BY avg_runtime DESC

expected.note: AVG, MIN, MAX on runtime_hours grouped by build_signature

queries.sql: SELECT sorter_model, ROUND(AVG(load_factor), 2) AS avg_load, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput, ROUND(AVG(load_factor) + AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS combined_score FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE load_factor IS NOT NULL AND throughput_rate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY sorter_model HAVING AVG(throughput_rate) > 300.0 ORDER BY combined_score DESC

expected.note: Computed aggregate expression (avg_load + avg_tput) with HAVING

queries.sql: SELECT operation_mode, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(CAST(COUNT(*) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 0) * 100.0, 2) AS pct_of_total FROM "query_agent_test" GROUP BY operation_mode ORDER BY cnt DESC

expected.note: Window-based percentage of total within GROUP BY result

queries.sql: SELECT facility_zone, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE load_factor > 60.0) AS high_load_cnt, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE load_factor <= 60.0) AS low_load_cnt, ROUND(AVG(cell_temp), 2) AS avg_cell_temp FROM "query_agent_test" GROUP BY facility_zone ORDER BY high_load_cnt DESC

expected.note: Conditional COUNT with CASE filtered GROUP BY

queries.sql: SELECT conveyor_lane, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE operation_mode='auto') AS auto_cnt, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE operation_mode='manual') AS manual_cnt, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE operation_mode='hybrid') AS hybrid_cnt FROM "query_agent_test" GROUP BY conveyor_lane ORDER BY conveyor_lane ASC

expected.note: Multiple FILTER aggregates for pivot-style output

queries.sql: SELECT control_center, ROUND(AVG(defect_limit), 3) AS avg_defect, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput, CASE WHEN AVG(defect_limit) > 2.0 THEN 'HIGH_DEFECT' WHEN AVG(throughput_rate) < 300.0 THEN 'LOW_THROUGHPUT' ELSE 'NOMINAL' END AS risk_flag FROM "query_agent_test" GROUP BY control_center ORDER BY avg_defect DESC

expected.note: CASE in SELECT of GROUP BY for computed classification

queries.sql: SELECT sorter_model, facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "query_agent_test" GROUP BY sorter_model, facility_zone ORDER BY sorter_model ASC, cnt DESC

expected.note: GROUP BY ROLLUP-style two-column grouping (simulated with regular GROUP BY)

queries.sql: WITH mode_counts AS (SELECT facility_zone, operation_mode, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "query_agent_test" GROUP BY facility_zone, operation_mode), ranked AS (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY facility_zone ORDER BY cnt DESC) AS rn FROM mode_counts) SELECT facility_zone, cnt AS mode_count, operation_mode AS dominant_mode FROM ranked WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY facility_zone ASC

expected.note: Subquery-based mode aggregation + dominant mode via CTE

queries.sql: SELECT operation_mode, MAX(item_count) AS max_tput_item, MIN(item_count) AS min_tput_item, MAX(item_count) - MIN(item_count) AS spread FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE item_count > 0 GROUP BY operation_mode ORDER BY spread DESC

expected.note: MAX-MIN spread computation in GROUP BY

queries.sql: SELECT conveyor_lane, SUM(scan_attempts) AS scan_total, ROUND(AVG(CAST(scan_attempts AS FLOAT)), 2) AS avg_scan, ROUND(CAST(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE scan_attempts >= 3) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100.0, 2) AS retry_rate FROM "query_agent_test" GROUP BY conveyor_lane ORDER BY retry_rate DESC

expected.note: SUM + AVG + computed rate per lane

queries.sql: SELECT build_signature, ROUND(STDDEV(throughput_rate), 2) AS std_tput, ROUND(AVG(load_factor), 2) AS avg_load, ROUND(STDDEV(throughput_rate) / NULLIF(AVG(throughput_rate), 0), 4) AS cv_tput FROM "query_agent_test" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY build_signature HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2 ORDER BY cv_tput DESC

expected.note: STDDEV + AVG + coefficient of variation per build

queries.sql: SELECT facility_zone, ROUND(CAST(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE charge_remaining < 30.0) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100.0, 2) AS below_30_pct, ROUND(CAST(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE charge_remaining > 70.0) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100.0, 2) AS above_70_pct FROM "query_agent_test" GROUP BY facility_zone ORDER BY below_30_pct DESC

expected.note: Percentage-bucketized aggregation with FILTER
